description: CompositionBlack belt made of canvas with leather strips, brass buckles, metal eyelets and white stitch detailingWash care Rub surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Give a well groomed appearance to your look with the right accessories. This black belt from lee looks good with denims, cargoes or white jeans and is great for casual wear. The white stitch detailing and lightly frayed edges add more interesting features to the belt.
